title: Customizable Wind Charges
description: Adds gamerules to change how Wind Charges work
body:
## Want more control over wind charges?
This mod adds a few gamerules that should make wind charges more useful/customizable ~~and could probably break the game lol~~.

## Gamerules Implemented
- /gamerule windChargeCooldown [number, defaulted to 10]
- /gamerule windChargePower [number, defaulted to 1]
- /gamerule windChargeKnockback [number, defaulted to 1]

##
